data.description: At levei, gain ability sprout pair 14th you the to dragon these speed. can to current as bonus on turno last you a action your They until dismiss as bonus on turno them a action your Youcan't your while manifest wings wearing armor unless armor made accommodate them, and the is to clothing made accommodate wings be

a of wings your gaining flying a speed from back, You create wings At levei, gain modicum control the over of 14th you a surges you on Whenever roll the wild ofyour magic. Wild Surge you roll and Magic table, can twice use either

As an action, you can spend sorcery points to draw upon the power of your ancestor and exude an aura of awe or fear. This ability allows you to affect creatures within a 60-foot radius for one minute. The aura ends if you lose concentration (as if concentrating on a spell) or if a hostile creature starts its turn within 5 feet of you and makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is charmed (if you chose awe) or frightened (if you chose fear). The effect ends when the creature succeeds on another Wisdom saving throw.
You draw power from the wild and untamed aspects of nature. You might be a half-orc who favors the war hammer or a human with an affinity for primal magic.
This origin grants you a magical heritage, allowing you to cast spells as a sorcerer.

Effect: On your turn for the next 45-46 rolls of this table, cast levitate on yourself. 01-02 A unicorn controlled by the DM appears within 5 feet of you and disappears after 1 minute. 03-04 For 1 minute, see invisible creatures with line of sight. 05-06 A modron appears for 1 minute. 07-08 A spectral shield hovers near you, granting a +2 AC bonus and immunity to magic missile damage. 09-10 Cast magic missile as a 5th-level spell centered on yourself. 11-12 Roll a d10; your height changes by that many inches. If odd, shrink; if even, grow. 13-14 Cast confusion centered on yourself for 1 minute. 15-16 For the next minute, shout when you speak. 17-18 For the next minute, regain 5 hit points at start of each turn. 19-20 Cast grease centered on yourself. 21-22 Creatures have disadvantage on saving throws against spells for the next minute. 23-24 An eye appears on your forehead; gain advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. 25-26 Spells with a casting time of 1 action now take 1 bonus action to cast. 27-28 Teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. 29-30 Are transported to the Astral Plane until end of your next turn, then return. 31-32 Maximize damage of the next damaging spell within the next minute. 33-34 Roll a d10; age changes by that many years. If odd, get younger (minimum 1 year old); if even, get older. 35-36 1d6 flumphs controlled by the DM appear within 60 feet and are frightened of you. They vanish after 1 minute. 37-38 Regain 2d10 hit points. 39-40 Turn into a potted plant until start of next turn; incapacitated, vulnerable to all damage, revert on 0 HP. 41-42 For the next minute, can teleport up to 20 feet as bonus action each turn.

Starting when you choose this origin at 1st level, you unleash untamed magic. After you cast your first spell of the day, roll a d20. On a roll of 1, on Wild Surge to a randomly determine the effect using the Wild Magic table.

Starting 6th level, you have the ability to twist your magic. When another creature makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can use your reaction to spend sorcery points and apply a d20 roll as a bonus or penalty (your choice) to that roll.
